arts.ttl: Confirmed: 3 changes as Barcelona name XI to face Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Barcelona’s starting line-up to take on Celta Vigo on Saturday night has been unveiled. And it features a number of altogether noteworthy changes. Barca are of course primed to return…

arts.ttl: ‘He’ll play there next season’ – Barcelona tipped to land Turkish international
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this weekend been tipped to secure the signature of Kerem Aktürkoğlu. Aktürkoğlu, for those not familiar with his name, is a 26-year-old Turkish international, who…

arts.ttl: Details: Barcelona boss Flick’s plan for Gavi vs Celta Vigo
arts.sum: An insight into the plans of Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick to make use of Gavi in the club’s meeting with Celta Vigo has this evening been provided. The name…

arts.ttl: Barcelona Transfer News: La Liga giants STUNNED by striker's contract demands
arts.sum: Having brought in the likes of Ilkay Gundogan, Inigo Martinez and Andreas Christensen on free transfers in recent years, Barca were hoping to repeat that trick with the signing of Jonathan David . It is claimed that David would cost the club a total of €80 million over a four-year deal – a figure described as ‘not unreasonable’ but currently too high for a player who would not be an undisputed starter.

arts.ttl: Barcelona identify Ajax star as latest free agent target
arts.sum: La Liga leaders Barcelona have set their sights on the signature of a soon-to-be out of contract member of the defensive ranks at Dutch giants Ajax. That’s according to Diario…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'keen' on Ajax star who 'could be available for free' next summer
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly interested in signing Ajax defender Devyne Rensch next summer but could face competition from Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Nike Total 90 Barcelona 25-26 Logo Leaked
arts.sum: As previously leaked, Nike will bring back the Total 90 design on the 25-26 third kit for elite clubs.

arts.ttl: Barcelona eyeing up fixture for key player’s long-awaited return from injury
arts.sum: It has been over four months since Ronald Araujo suffered a high-grade hamstring tear whilst playing for Uruguay at the Copa America. Since then, he has been on the road to recovery, and very soon, that will be coming to an end. On Friday, Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick revealed that Araujo should be fine […] The post Barcelona eyeing up fixture for key player’s long-awaited return from injury appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: ‘Unfair situation’ – Hansi Flick could sanction Barcelona youngster’s exit in January
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick could sanction the mid-season departure of a young member of his midfield ranks. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Pablo Torre as the…

arts.ttl: Barcelona receive major boost as star man 'agrees' to sign new long-term deal
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly agree a new deal with Spain international Lamine Yamal, who is set to commit his long-term future to the Catalan giants.
